canvasTabs.label: Readiness
canvasTabs.description: Headline gauge: hours x/20, Core A/B status, days-to-deadline countdown, and the single verdict (ON TRACK / BEHIND / AT RISK / SUBMITTED / CLEAR). Never green until the Commission confirms posting.

canvasTabs.label: Coursework
canvasTabs.description: The 20-hour plan — Core (Part A + Part B) plus electives, each with status, provider, hours, and the next action. Core-first triage as the deadline nears.

canvasTabs.label: Record
canvasTabs.description: Append-only attested-evidence logbook — every completion, provenance-tagged, verified/pending badge. The portable license record (reads license-record/v1).

canvasTabs.label: Submission
canvasTabs.description: The deliver to submit to confirm tracker. Distinct states: not submitted, submitted <ts>, confirmed posted <ts>. Surfaces the submitted-vs-confirmed gap loudly.

canvasTabs.label: Audit
canvasTabs.description: Forensic trail — who pulled / attested / submitted what, when, at what ce-ruleset version.

_notes.trust_moat: The readiness verdict is NEVER 'CLEAR' until a report-confirmation for posting is received from the Commission (Rule R1).
_notes.core_gate: 20 hours without Core A AND Core B is NOT compliant — readiness shows AT RISK regardless of total hours (Rule R2).
_notes.sample_until_verified: Until WORKER-SPEC.md section 8 VERIFY items are confirmed, every tab shows SAMPLE data and says so (Rule R5).
_notes.default_required: readiness is the single default:true tab.
_notes.ids_are_stable: Tab ids are referenced by service.js and sample-data.js. Don't rename after first merge.
